summary: EXP-192 closes the critical citation-integrity hole in WIN-012 detail_evidence. The unverifiable "Confirms electromagnetic, not gravitational" quote (not present on the live dome site per WebFetch 2026-04-20) has been removed entirely. The replacement paragraph now cites the dome's actual current live-site framing ("cannot discriminate between the models" because the ECM pipeline applies Chebychev low-pass attenuation of contact-phase transients before Level-3 release) with explicit URL and access date, and shows that this framing is itself fatal to kappa — the dome's own pipeline systematically filters out exactly the contact-phase signal kappa needs as its denominator.
